name: @ctox/business-os-test-bootstrap
description: Declared dev dependency bootstrap for CTOX Business OS JS and browser tests. Runtime assets stay package-manager-free.

scripts.check:office: node office-engine/oracle/validate-feature-matrix.mjs && node office-engine/validate-rollout.mjs && node office-engine/validate-completion-audit.mjs && node office-engine/capture-release-evidence.mjs --self-test && node ../../scripts/check-office-skill-gating.mjs && node scripts/assert-managed-business-os-assets.mjs --self-test && node --test office-engine/office-engine.test.mjs
scripts.test:module-bundles: node modules/calendar/calendar.test.mjs && node modules/ctox/test.js && node modules/customers/customers.test.mjs && node modules/iot/iot.test.mjs && node modules/notes/notes.test.mjs && node modules/outbound/outbound.test.mjs && node modules/research/test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check:deps && npm run check:office && npm run check:release-docs && npm run check:security-signoff && npm run test:shared && npm run test:app-store
